chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-118 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-04-2025 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Naseer Ahmed, Accounts Clerk, Town Committee, Kotdiji. **** Accounts Clerk, Town Committee Kotdiji is present and presents seven original cheques dated 15.05.2025, 15.06.2025, 15.07.2025, 15.08.2025, 15.09.2025, 15.10.2025 and 15.11.2025 in lieu of arrears of Group Insurance, which are handed over to the petitioner after obtaining acknowledgment receipt. Insofar as payment of Leave Encashment is concerned, he submits that petitioner has not submitted required documents. Counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner will approach him within seven days along with entire required documents. Once documents are submitted by petitioner, Accounts Clerk is directed to process the case of petitioner and release the payment of Leave Encashment within a period of two months, failing which contempt of court proceedings may be initiated against respondents. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
